name: Kidney Care & Management
description: Comprehensive medical care focused on preventing, diagnosing, and managing kidney-related conditions. Our team provides personalized treatment plans, lifestyle guidance, and continuous monitoring to protect kidney function and improve overall health.

name: Dialysis Services
description: Advanced dialysis treatments designed to support patients with kidney failure. Our modern dialysis units and experienced specialists ensure safe, effective, and comfortable sessions for patients requiring regular renal support.

name: Hypertension & Diabetes Management
description: Specialized care for patients living with hypertension and diabetes — two major risk factors for kidney disease. We provide expert monitoring, medication management, dietary guidance, and long-term care strategies.

name: Kidney Transplant
description: Expert kidney transplant services supported by a highly trained surgical and medical team. From evaluation to surgery and post-transplant care, we provide comprehensive support for successful transplant outcomes.

name: Diagnostics
description: State-of-the-art diagnostic services designed to detect kidney diseases early and monitor patient health effectively. Our diagnostic services support both prevention and long-term disease management.

name: Basic Tests to Detect Early Kidney Disease
description: Routine laboratory tests that help identify early signs of kidney disease. Early detection allows timely intervention, helping patients maintain healthy kidney function.

name: Post-Transplant Tests
description: Specialized tests carried out after kidney transplantation to monitor organ function, detect possible complications early, and ensure the long-term success of the transplant.

name: Basic Standard Routine Tests
description: Essential health screening tests that provide a general overview of a patient’s health status and help detect potential medical conditions at an early stage.

name: Platinum Standard Routine Tests
description: Comprehensive health screening packages that provide deeper insights into a patient’s health through advanced laboratory and diagnostic evaluations.

name: Gold Standard Routine Tests
description: Premium diagnostic screening designed to deliver detailed health insights using advanced testing protocols and expert analysis.
